assertions.evidence: Output contains 'Sequence: D.1 → D.2' in header and D.1 section appears before D.2 section in document order
D.1 section shows 'Progress Status Update' with YAML update and 'D.1 COMPLETE — Progress status updated to completed'
D.2 section shows 'Spec Archival' with 'git mv' to openspec/archive/ and 'D.2 COMPLETE — Spec moved to openspec/archive/realtime-notifications/'
Output contains 'Phase D COMPLETE — realtime-notifications feature fully closed' in summary section
